release.publicApiMeaning: PUBLIC_API.md files guard against accidental exports; they are not API or schema freezes.

invariants: Already-clear algebra must become type-proof or boot-proof.
Every ledger fact has one commit primitive as its source generator.
Every algebra has one code source.
Runtime validation is only for unknown external input, not internally constructed states.
Every fact has exactly one writer.
Do not derive intent from actual.

holds.text: MCP registry support is not part of the {releaseLine} surface; it remains a hold until discovery, install, authority, and material contracts converge across products.

packages.name: @agent-os/core
packages.role: neutral substrate axioms, owner identity helpers, value brands, protocol schemas, shared errors, material refs, AgentSchema, tool algebra, and backend/runtime/LLM/telemetry vocabulary
packages.boundary: neutral core algebra only: no runtime service loop, backend interpreter, framework adapter, provider SDK, target ambient implementation, or disputed event-projection fold
packages.readmeStatus: {releaseLine} active development. Public exports are listed for package ownership; they are not frozen.
packages.apiStatus: {releaseLine} active development. Public exports are listed for accidental export control only; this is not an API freeze.

packages.name: @agent-os/runtime
packages.role: Effect Tag runtime programs, backend-neutral runtime services, projections, workspace-job observability joins, and optional-peer subpath adapters for Cloudflare, in-memory, Node, Effect AI, and OTLP telemetry.
packages.boundary: runtime root exports only backend-neutral ledger/projection/service algebra. Platform/provider and wire-projection integrations live behind explicit subpath exports: ./ag-ui, ./cloudflare, ./cloudflare/do-rpc, ./in-memory, ./node, ./llm-effect-ai, and ./telemetry-otlp; root JS and root declarations must not leak subpath-only peers. The ./ag-ui subpath is a browser-safe projection over runtime-protocol Recorded vocabulary, not the client state model.
packages.need: Runtime substrate and statically linked adapter subpaths
packages.readmeStatus: {releaseLine} active development. Runtime root is backend-neutral; optional integrations are selected by explicit subpath and optional peer dependencies.
packages.apiStatus: {releaseLine} active development. Public exports are listed for accidental export control; subpath integrations are not independent package boundaries.

packages.name: @agent-os/client
packages.role: transport-neutral agent client store, typed command surface, and optional framework subpath bridges
packages.boundary: framework-neutral root client state machine surface plus React/Svelte subpath adapters; root consumes runtime-protocol Recorded projections and injected transports with no React, Svelte, AG-UI, or product UI dependency
packages.need: Agent client core and framework bridges
packages.readmeStatus: {releaseLine} active development. Public exports are listed in `PUBLIC_API.md` to prevent accidental exports; the package owns the transport-neutral root client state machine and optional React/Svelte subpaths.
packages.apiStatus: {releaseLine} active development for the canonical agent client package. Root exports cover framework-neutral stores, transport injection contracts, Recorded runtime-event snapshots, symbolic ref lifecycle, and generic command invocation; `./react` and `./svelte` are optional-peer subpath adapters.

packages.name: @agent-os/cli
packages.role: developer command surface for generated projections, authored agent builds, structural checks, and distribution gates
packages.boundary: host-side Node command runner only; it may read repo source files and package metadata, but it does not own ledger identity, runtime facts, target linking semantics, or generated projection truth
packages.readmeStatus: {releaseLine} active development. CLI commands are the supported developer surface; generated projections remain owned by their source facts.
packages.apiStatus: {releaseLine} active development. CLI root exports are the supported developer API; command internals remain implementation details.

packages.name: @agent-os/docs-site
packages.boundary: static documentation site projection, not documentation fact source
packages.readmeStatus: Private tooling package. It renders projected docs and is not published.
